title: Shirahoshi’s Fear Escalates
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, Royal Guards, King Neptune, Hody Jones, Shirahoshi, Vander Decken. The core story beat is shirahoshi’s fear escalates.
scene: The scene centers on shirahoshi’s fear escalates, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, Royal Guards, King Neptune, Hody Jones, Shirahoshi, Vander Decken driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's... just his natural strength, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah... He's not even drugged up right now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Crap... He's flooding the place with sea- water!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: G - Get Down!!! He's gonna do that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare you attack the Elite Soldiers of my Army so carelessly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Stop this at once, you fool!!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Your majesty!!! Please, don't do this!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: What kind of King takes a bullet for his servants?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You really aren't fit for the throne at all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And his strength is way beyond Arlong's!!

summary: Shirahoshi’s Fear Escalates. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
